类 PropertyNameHelper

java.lang.Object
com.github.hsindumas.stagger.extension.json.PropertyNameHelper
public class PropertyNameHelper extends Object
PropertyNameHelper - Utility class for translating property naming strategies. This class is primarily used to convert annotation-defined naming strategies into actual naming strategies used in the code. It mainly supports several Jackson naming strategy conversions.

  • 字段概要

    字段
    修饰符和类型
    字段
    说明
    static final String
    JACKSON_KEBAB_CASE
    Jackson's kebab_case naming strategy
    static final String
    JACKSON_LOWER_CAMEL_CASE
    Jackson's lowerCamelCase naming strategy
    static final String
    JACKSON_LOWER_CASE
    Jackson's lower naming strategy
    static final String
    JACKSON_LOWER_DOT_CASE
    Jackson's lower.dot.case naming strategy
    static final String
    JACKSON_SNAKE_CASE
    Jackson's snake_case naming strategy
    static final String
    JACKSON_UPPER_CAMEL_CASE
    Jackson's UPPER_CAMEL_CASE naming strategy
    static final String
    JACKSON_UPPER_SNAKE_CASE
    Jackson's UPPER_SNAKE_CASE naming strategy

  • 方法详细资料

    • translate

      public static PropertyNamingStrategies.NamingBase translate(ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, List<com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaAnnotation> javaAnnotations)
      Translates Java annotations to property naming strategies.
      参数:
      projectBuilder - the project builder
      javaAnnotations - List of Java annotations on a property
      返回:
      The property naming strategy, or null if no matching strategy is found
